items.label: Ego Death
items.desc: The death of a previous self, for a greater future self. Using tools such as hypnosis to rebuild anew oneself bit by bit

items.label: Feminization
items.desc: Sometimes you just want a little help into accepting who you really want to be, doing so through sexual means is a powerful way of fighting repressed traumas and opresing cultural views
